falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,650 on any day within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match would be invalidated because that bottom formation did not feature a V-shaped recovery exceeding prior swing highs within 14 days; this would signal a stronger bullish reversal than the historical analog suggests

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14.00 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 implies elevated fear/uncertainty that should persist near a bottom; sustained VIX compression would indicate the capitulation event has been negated and the bottom call was premature

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield breaks above 4.50% and holds above it for 2 consecutive closes
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern occurred during a disinflationary/rate-relief regime; a sharp rates breakout would violate the macro conditions that enabled that bottom, making the 79% pattern match structurally invalid

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
